name: Aarav Mehta
summary: Motivated Software Engineer with 1 year of industry experience in full-stack web development using React.js and Node.js. Completed 2 internships during B.Tech and delivered a production SaaS feature used by 500+ users. Looking to grow in a product-focused engineering team.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed 3 new frontend modules for Zoho CRM using React.js and TypeScript, improving UI load time by 18%.
Wrote RESTful APIs using Node.js (Express) integrated with PostgreSQL, handling 10K+ daily API calls.
Participated in bi-weekly code reviews and resolved 40+ production bugs in first quarter.
Wrote unit tests using Jest achieving 75% code coverage for assigned modules.

experience.title: Frontend Developer Intern
responsibilities: Built responsive landing pages using React.js and Tailwind CSS for 3 client projects.
Integrated payment gateway (Razorpay) and reduced checkout abandonment by 12%.
Collaborated with the design team to implement Figma specs with pixel accuracy.

projects.name: TaskFlow – Project Management Tool
projects.description: Built a real-time project management app with kanban boards, task assignment, and deadline tracking. 200+ GitHub stars. Deployed on Railway.app.

projects.name: MediAlert – Hospital Appointment System
projects.description: Developed a hospital appointment booking system with automated SMS reminders. Used as final year project. Presented at VTU Tech Fest 2023.

achievements: Ranked in Top 100 in ZCoder Internal Coding Contest at Zoho (Q1 2024)
Won 2nd prize at StartupDen Hackathon (24-hour product build challenge)
Dean's List — 5th and 6th semester (CGPA > 8.0 in both)
